results.rendered_html:
ava-√kṣip -kṣipati (Subj. -kṣi pat,  RV. iv, 27, 3 ; p. -kṣipat mfn.,  RV. x, 68, 4 )
to throw down, cause to fly down or away, hurl,  RV.  &c.;
to revile,  MBh. ii, 1337  (v.l. apa for ava);
to grant, yield,  MBh. xiii, 3030.  Caus. (aor. Subj. 3. pl. -cikṣipan) to cause to fall down,  AV. xviii, 4, 12  and 13.

results.rendered_html:
avakṣip 6 U.
1 To fling away, to throw or cast off; sūkṣmavastramavakṣipya munivastrāṇyavasta ha  Rām. ; to hurl.
2 To cause to fly down or away.
3 To reprimand, revile any one, censure, slander; madalekhāmavakṣipya  K. 317 ; avākṣipadvāsudevaṃ  Mb. 
4 To grant, yield.
— Caus. To cause to fall down.
